# gars-yellow-dark.theme

## brand
- main: #e3c220
- gold: #826f11

## base
- background: #1e1904
- mantle:     #322f1f
- base:       #3b3724
- crust:      #262418
- metal:      #413c1e

## surfaces
- surface0: #5b5742
- surface1: #6e6951
- surface2: #807b62

## overlays
- overlay0: #8c876d
- overlay1: #a29c7f
- overlay2: #b7b193

## text
- bright-foreground: #fcf9e8
- foreground:        #f6eec9
- subtext1:          #ded7b4
- subtext0:          #cbc4a3
- dim-foreground:    #a29c7f

## highlights
- light-yellow: #efdd84
- beige:        #f8ebac
- bright:       #fcf9e8

## cursor
- cursor:         #efdd84
- cursor-text:    #3b3724
- vi-cursor:      #e3c220
- vi-cursor-text: #3b3724

## search
- search-match-fg:   #1e1904
- search-match-bg:   #b7b193
- search-focused-fg: #1e1904
- search-focused-bg: #e3c220

## footer bar
- footer-fg: #1e1904
- footer-bg: #b7b193

## hints
- hints-start-fg: #1e1904
- hints-start-bg: #e3c220
- hints-end-fg:   #1e1904
- hints-end-bg:   #a29c7f

## selection
- selection-text: #1e1904
- selection-bg:   #efdd84

## ansi normal (0–7) — saturated
- black:   #322f1f
- red:     #e06060
- green:   #b8d840
- yellow:  #e3c220
- blue:    #5298e0
- magenta: #d460c0
- cyan:    #40c0d8
- white:   #ded7b4

## ansi bright (8–15) — pastel
- black:   #3b3724
- red:     #ef8484
- green:   #e4ef84
- yellow:  #efdd84
- blue:    #84baef
- magenta: #ef84ac
- cyan:    #84e0ef
- white:   #cbc4a3

## indexed
- 16 / orange: #e08850
- 17 / beige:  #f8ebac

## accents
- red:     normal #e06060 / bright #ef8484
- orange:  #e08850
- green:   normal #b8d840 / bright #e4ef84
- cyan:    normal #40c0d8 / bright #84e0ef
- blue:    normal #5298e0 / bright #84baef
- magenta: #d460c0
- pink:    #ef84ac
